Bus Timings

Bus 98E Timetable Al Quoz Bus Station to Safest Way and Return

February 17, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

You gotta hear about Bus 98E - it’s a real lifeline in Dubai.

The RTA’s behind this one, making sure people can easily get to all the important places - you know, big businesses, malls, schools, apartment complexes, the works. It’s a total game-changer for the daily grind crowd, and the best part? It won’t empty your wallet. Seriously, if you’re trying to get around this crazy busy city without breaking the bank, Bus 98E is your ticket to ride.

Route Name 98E
Route Description Al Quoz Bus Station · 2 - Safest Way - Al Quoz Bus Station · 2
Total Distance Approximately 18 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 1 hour 20 minutes
Operational Hours 05:42 to 23:46 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus 98E

Bus 98E Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

The Bus 98E operates frequently throughout the day, allowing for convenient travel during both peak and off-peak hours. Below are the bus timings:

From Al Quoz Bus Station From Safest Way

Bus 98E Timetable

For a detailed timetable, visit the RTA website or simply click here for Bus 98E Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for the 98E bus route within 1 zone is AED 3, payable using a Nol card, which is mandatory for all public transport in Dubai. Discounts are available for students, senior citizens, and people of determination. This affordable fare structure makes commuting via the 98E bus a cost-effective option for daily travelers.

Bus Booking

The 98E bus operates on a first-come, first-served basis, with no pre-booking required—passengers can board at any designated stop. To plan your journey, the RTA Dubai app offers real-time tracking and route information. For those seeking more convenience, ride-hailing apps like Careem provide flexible travel options, especially during peak hours when buses may be crowded, ensuring a hassle-free ride along the 98E route.

Bus Route

The 98E route begins at Al Quoz Bus Station and travels through significant stops before reaching its terminus at Satwa, Roundabout. Here’s a detailed list of the stops along the route:

  1. Al Quoz Bus Station · 2

  2. Queen Palace Factory

  3. Galadari Printing & Publishing

  4. Bin Hindi

  5. Shirawi, Scania

  6. Bosch Center

  7. Marine Center

  8. Al Futtaim Motors

  9. Oasis Center

  10. Box Park 2

  11. Dar Al Ber Society

  12. Street 35A

  13. Al Ittihad Health Center

  14. Emarat Headquarters, Street 35

  15. Emirates General Petroleum Corporation

  16. Gulf News

  17. Dubai Modern School

  18. Lufthansa

  19. Safa, Terminus

  20. Safest Way

  21. Mazaya Center

  22. Ghaya Residence

  1. Wasl, Masjid

  4. Satwa Square

  5. Satwa, Masjid

  6. Satwa, Post Office

  7. Satwa, Roundabout

  8. Trade Center Metro Station

  9. White Crown Tower

  10. Durrah Tower

  11. Emirates Tower Metro Seaside

  12. Rostamani Tower

  13. Emirates General Petroleum Corporation

  14. Gulf News

  15. Dubai Modern School

  16. Emarat Headquarters, Street 35

  17. Al Quoz Bus Station · 2

The route ensures connectivity to several commercial hubs and residential communities, making it an essential service for daily commuters.

Bus 98E Station Overview

Al Quoz Bus Station · 2

Al Quoz Bus Station serves as a major transit hub in the bustling industrial and residential area of Al Quoz. The station is equipped with essential amenities such as seating areas and real-time bus information, ensuring a comfortable and efficient travel experience.

White Crown Tower Bus Stop Intersection

The White Crown Tower Bus Stop is a key transit point where Bus Routes 21, 98E, F11, and F28 intersect. This station offers passengers easy access to various destinations across Dubai, enhancing connectivity for both daily commuters and visitors. Its strategic location near important landmarks and commercial areas makes it a convenient stop for those traveling through the city, providing seamless transfers between these bus routes.

Safest Way

The Safest Way stop is conveniently located near a popular supermarket in Al Quoz, making it a busy station for both shoppers and commuters. This stop caters to the daily needs of residents and workers in the area, providing easy access to public transportation. The station is well-maintained and strategically positioned to serve those looking to travel quickly and efficiently within the Al Quoz district.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

There are several notable tourist attractions and destinations along the Bus 98E route in Dubai:

  1. Oasis Center: A popular shopping mall located on Sheikh Zayed Road, offering a variety of retail stores, dining options, and entertainment facilities.

2.

  1. It offers beautiful green spaces, lakes, and playgrounds, making it a popular spot for families and tourists.

4.

  1. Trade Center Metro Station: Located near Dubai World Trade Centre, a key venue for international events, exhibitions, and conferences. The area also has access to nearby hotels and restaurants.

6.

These locations provide a blend of shopping, dining, leisure, and business opportunities for tourists exploring Dubai along the 98E bus route.

Journey Experience

Taking Bus Route 98E from Al Quoz Bus Station to Safest Way offers a unique glimpse into Dubai’s evolving landscape, combining urban vibrancy with local culture.

Arriving at Safest Way, you’ll find a bustling area with various shops and eateries reflecting Dubai’s multicultural fabric, making this bus ride not just a means of transportation but an enriching experience that highlights the dynamic essence of the city.

Travelling with Careem

Using the Careem app, you can easily reach Safest Way, the furthest point on the 98E bus route starting from Al Quoz Bus Station · 2, with a fare ranging from AED 37 to AED 44. The app offers a convenient way to book your ride and ensures a smooth and comfortable journey across the entire route. It’s a reliable option for hassle-free travel.

The Bus 98E is a vital route for Dubai commuters, providing reliable and affordable transport. With extensive coverage and frequent service, it connects key areas, making daily commutes convenient. Whether traveling for work, school, or leisure, the 98E offers a seamless journey through Dubai’s vibrant cityscape.
